use_cases: Hero section text with interactive morphing animations between word pairs
Landing page headlines that change on hover using smooth letter transitions
Interactive typography for creative websites requiring engaging text effects
Animated text components that cycle through word pairs on click interaction
Themable morphing text using CSS variables for primary and foreground colors
ai_summary: A reusable React component that displays text with fluid letter-by-letter morphing animations. Supports word pairs, hover-to-morph interactions, click cycling through pairs, and customizable animation colors through CSS variables. Built with Framer Motion for smooth letter-by-letter transitions. Ideal for creating engaging hero headlines, interactive typography effects, and animated text reveals in modern web applications.
